title: New AI image generator BEATS EVERYTHING
summary: A YouTube review from the AI Search channel comparing ChatGPT Images 2.0 to Nano Banana across dozens of test cases including poster generation, UI design, spatial reasoning, and other visual tasks. The reviewer demonstrates the tool's capabilities through extended demonstrations with timestamps for each use case.
